{
  "sprint_goal": "Enable secure user authentication, improve checkout performance, and lay groundwork for payment processing and CI/CD.",
  "selected_stories": [
    {
      "id": "TASK-108",
      "title": "Integrate payment gateway",
      "story_points": 13,
      "assignee": "Developer 1 (Backend)",
      "notes": "Coordinate with finance team for API keys; ensure sandbox testing."
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-105",
      "title": "API rate limiting implementation",
      "story_points": 5,
      "assignee": "Developer 1 (Backend)",
      "notes": "Use Redis for token bucket; add unit tests."
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-100",
      "title": "User authentication with OAuth2",
      "story_points": 5,
      "assignee": "Developer 2 (Full‑stack)",
      "notes": "Leverage existing auth library; configure providers."
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-101",
      "title": "Product search with filters",
      "story_points": 8,
      "assignee": "Developer 2 (Full‑stack)",
      "notes": "Implement backend query and UI filter components."
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-106",
      "title": "Fix checkout page loading performance",
      "story_points": 3,
      "assignee": "Developer 3 (Frontend)",
      "notes": "Profile bundle, lazy‑load assets, and optimize images."
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-111",
      "title": "Set up staging environment CI/CD",
      "story_points": 5,
      "assignee": "Developer 3 (DevOps)",
      "notes": "Create pipeline scripts; integrate with test suite."
    }
  ],
  "total_story_points": 39,
  "capacity_breakdown": {
    "total_team_days": 30,
    "planned_dev_days": 24,
    "buffer_days": 6
  },
  "deferred_stories": [
    "TASK-110",
    "TASK-109",
    "TASK-102",
    "TASK-112",
    "TASK-107",
    "TASK-104",
    "TASK-103",
    "TASK-113",
    "TASK-114"
  ],
  "sprint_risks": [
    "Payment gateway integration may encounter third‑party API latency or credential issues.",
    "CI/CD pipeline configuration for staging could delay deployment if environment variables are mis‑configured."
  ],
  "definition_of_ready_check": [
    "all stories have acceptance criteria",
    "dependencies resolved"
  ]
}
